data.name: Xvirus
data.detailed_description:
故事背景

一個威脅正在蔓延。一群數位病毒決定攻擊熱門遊戲中的女性角色。動機為何？嫉妒。它們認為自己的遊戲之所以失敗，是因為這些角色更受歡迎、更受青睞。 現在，你進入了自己的電腦內部，必須直面病毒，防止它們抹除你最喜愛遊戲中的角色。在病毒徹底腐蝕這個虛擬宇宙之前，救出她們是恢復平衡的唯一方法。

遊戲特色

  • 經典清版動作遊戲 (Beat ’em Up)，帶來直接的打擊感與激烈的戰鬥。

  • 可解鎖場景中的互動系統。

  • 動畫手動控制功能。

  • 可調節速度選項，打造個人化體驗。

  • 場景中整合了沉浸式音訊。

  • 每救出一個角色，都會解鎖新的像素藝術 (Pixel Art) 場景，加深與她們的聯繫。

  • 持續開發中，並定期發布更新。

注意

遊戲仍處於開發階段，未來將推出更多內容與角色。

data.short_description: 被困在自己的電腦裡，這究竟是一場美夢，還是一場惡夢？
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo E8400, 3.0GHz or AMD Athlon 64 X2 6000+, 3.0GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Geforce 9600 GT or AMD HD 3870 512MB
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 150 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Xvirus
data.detailed_description:
STORY

A threat is spreading. A group of digital viruses has decided to attack female characters from hit games. The reason? Envy. They believe their own games failed because these characters are more popular and highly desired. Now, you are inside your computer and must face the viruses to stop them from eliminating the characters of your favorite games. Saving each of them is the only way to restore balance to this virtual universe before the virus corrupts it completely.

FEATURES

  • Classic Beat ’em Up with direct action and intense combat.

  • Interactive system in unlockable scenes.

  • Manual control over animations.

  • Speed variation option to customize the experience.

  • Immersive audio integrated into the scenes.

  • With each character saved, new pixel art scenes are unlocked, deepening the connection with each one of them.

  • Active development with frequent updates.

ATTENTION

The game is still in development and will receive new content and characters.

data.short_description: Trapped inside your own computer—are you living a dream or a nightmare?
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo E8400, 3.0GHz or AMD Athlon 64 X2 6000+, 3.0GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Geforce 9600 GT or AMD HD 3870 512MB
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 150 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
